chapters.title: — Headline: Effect, Caveat, and Practice Impact
— Round 1: Lehman / Longitudinal AI Mammography Risk
— Round 2: Peeters / LUNA25 Lung Nodule Challenge
— Round 3: Ma / MR Lymphangiography Venous Suppression
— Round 4: Shu / Shortcut Learning in Chest Radiograph AI

follow_up_links.reason: Demonstrates annotation-free 3D fibroid segmentation with cross-center generalization, potentially reducing manual contouring burden in surgical planning workflows.
follow_up_links.title: Reconstruction from multi-planar MRI with foundation models for uterine fibroid analysis

follow_up_links.reason: Shows AI mammography risk scores rise before cancer diagnosis in a large cohort, supporting dynamic rather than static risk stratification.
follow_up_links.title: Longitudinal Analysis of Changes in Deep Learning Image-based Breast Cancer Risk Scores over Time

follow_up_links.reason: Establishes that top AI systems match or exceed radiologist performance for indeterminate lung nodule risk on a standardized external benchmark.
follow_up_links.title: Benchmarking of AI and Radiologists for Indeterminate Lung Nodule Malignancy Risk Estimation on Screening CT: The LUNA25 Challenge

follow_up_links.reason: Improves diagnostic clarity in MR lymphangiography for lymphedema, relevant to post-surgical and post-radiation imaging in oncology.
follow_up_links.title: MR Lymphangiography for Diagnosis of Lower Extremity Lymphedema: Suppressing Venous Signal Interference Using Deep Learning

follow_up_links.reason: Reveals that DL models exploit exposure parameters as shortcuts, a deployment-critical bias finding for any chest radiograph AI.
follow_up_links.title: Impact of Exposure Parameters on Deep Learning Models in Chest Radiography and Implications for Deployment

key_claims.claim: A foundation-model framework can perform 3D uterine fibroid segmentation from routine multi-planar MRI without manual annotation and generalizes across centers.
AI-derived mammography risk scores increase longitudinally in women who develop breast cancer, diverging from cancer-free trajectories.
The best AI system in the LUNA25 challenge matched or exceeded radiologist performance for malignancy risk estimation in 5–15 mm lung nodules.
Deep learning venous-signal suppression improves diagnostic clarity in MR lymphangiography for lower extremity lymphedema.
Chest X-ray DL models exploit radiographic exposure parameters as shortcuts, producing measurable performance bias across institutions.
